violations.description: POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of refried beans cut vegetables and mixed drinks in the under counter cooler and the storage room upright cooler was noted not being properly dated for disposition.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): Dipper well was noted not operating.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in ware-washing area noted blocked with a towel bucket.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of vegetables rice beans and other prepared foods was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the coolers and in the chest freezer.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled. Observed personal food items in the 2 door upright cooler and in the chest freezer not labeled to prevent usage for customer ordered food items.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling tile in the food storage and ware-washing areas noted needs to be replaced.
